sn3.23:1.2: As he was sitting to one side, King Pasenadi Kosala said to the Blessed One:
sn3.23:1.3: “How many qualities of the world that, when arising, arise for harm, stress, & discomfort?”
sn3.23:1.4: “Three qualities of the world, great king, when arising, arise for harm, stress, & discomfort.
sn3.23:1.6: Greed, great king, is a quality of the world that, when arising, arises for harm, stress, & discomfort.
sn3.23:1.8: Delusion is a quality of the world that, when arising, arises for harm, stress, & discomfort.
sn3.23:1.9: These are the three qualities of the world, great king, that when arising, arise for harm, stress, & discomfort.”
sn3.23:1.10: That is what the Blessed One said. Having said that, the One Well-Gone, the Teacher, said further:
sn3.23:2.3: destroy the person of evil awareness,
sn3.23:2.4: as its own fruit, the reed.”
